name: Sipelga 14
overview: Eight-episode 2007 recut of the Estonian sketch comedy Wremja, named in reference to the long-running soap opera Õnne 13. The residents of Sipelga 14 include hairdresser Mart and his wife Maie, the deranged psychiatrist Dr. Liiv, and the building's spiritual centre - Estonia's first cosmonaut Jaan Zorro. Written by Andrus Kivirähk and Mart Juur.
